name: Linum
short_description: Difficult puzzles that will test your logical thinking skills.
detailed_description:
Linum is a puzzle game that will test your logical thinking skills. 50+ handcrafted levels designed to teach, test and challenge.

Made by one person, it's challenging and for all ages.

Key features

Puzzles aimed at pushing the limits rather than "more of the same".

Original artwork and music.

No microtransaction/DLC/subscription, DRM-free.

Playable with mouse, keyboard, controller or any combination of these.

About the gameplay

The goal of the game is to create a matching image of the objective while consuming all the resources available. The resources are either creator or modifiers.
